problem id: 8fa7ea3a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  01111010 -> 00110100
  11010010 -> 00100001
  11000011 -> 10000001
  00110101 -> 00001010
  00010000 -> 00000000
  11010000 -> 00100000
  01101000 -> 00010000
  01010110 -> 00101000
  00100010 -> 00000000

query: 10110011
predicted answer: 01000001
